name: awardblock
description: Verifiable Web3 award archive and ERC-20 claim platform for hackathons and builder programs.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @awardblock/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @awardblock/api --filter @awardblock/web build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @awardblock/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @awardblock/shared --filter @awardblock/api --filter @awardblock/web test
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @awardblock/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @awardblock/shared --filter @awardblock/api --filter @awardblock/web lint
